StatusLabel.text: Currently working on Nexus and Evo

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.text: Whether it's for a collaboration, sharing a project idea or just exchanging, my email inbox is always open!

Hero.title: Hi, I'm Lenny.
Hero.text: I'm 16 years old and I spend most of my time learning and developing projects around computer science. My goal today is to become an engineer-entrepreneur.

About.title: About me
About.alt: Illustration for the about me section
About.text: I'm Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER, and I live in Normandy in the northwest of France. I started getting interested in engineering and coding at the age of 14. Since then, I haven't stopped learning several programming languages and frameworks, allowing me to acquire several technical skills despite my young age. On the other hand, I have developed a great curiosity for sciences and mathematics, as well as a desire to entrepreneurship. My future still questions me a lot, which is why today I am looking to continuously develop myself and find my path.

Metadata.title: Home
Metadata.description: Welcome to the personal website of Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER, a 16-year-old passionate about entrepreneurship, technology and web development. Discover his projects, his journey and how to contact him.

Metadata.title: Projects
Metadata.description: Discover all the projects of Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER

nexus.description: Nexus is a 1901 association divided into two branches. On the one hand, Nexus Community: A community open to everyone, which constitutes an environment for exchanging, learning, helping each other and evolving surrounded by ambitious people. On the other hand, Nexus Team: The core of Nexus, a more engaged circle that brings together involved members to build concrete projects together, collaborate seriously and develop the Nexus ecosystem.
nexus.goal: The goal of Nexus is to build a community and an ecosystem that allow everyone to develop, innovate and materialize their ideas. We want to create an environment where ambitious people can connect, learn from each other and collaborate to build meaningful projects.
nexus.skills: Web development (HTML, SCSS, JavaScript), community management, event organization, communication and marketing.
nexus.role: Lenny (Co-founder and developer), Romain (Co-founder and developer), Arthur (Development manager), Nixoo (DDeveloper), KL (DDeveloper)

Metadata.title: {name}
Metadata.description: Discover the project of Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER

Hero.title: About
Hero.text: Hey, I'm Lenny, 16 years old. This page traces my journey up to today, the different steps that have brought me here and the topics that occupy a large part of my time nowadays.
Hero.alt: Illustration for the section about me

steps.title: My early years
steps.text: Very quickly, at the age of 7, I was introduced to video games and screens. From then on, I spent a large part of my time playing different games, going up to sometimes 14 hours per day during holidays. I had no particular passion, I just let myself be carried away.

steps.title: A change
steps.text: One day, video games tired me out, or to be honest, disgusted me. However, I didn't want to do anything else. While I was lost, I started doing sports and experimenting with several activities like drawing, music and discovering various sciences like astronomy and computer science. Any activity involving a screen repulsed me.

steps.title: The discovery of coding
steps.text: When I was in 8th grade, I discovered coding thanks to my friend Romain who showed me how to create a website. I decided to explore this field, like any other activity, and I started learning HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Whether it's the logical or creative aspect, I liked it, but what made me continue were the infinite possibilities that coding offers. Indeed, we can create almost anything we want with code, whether it's a website, a mobile application, a video game or even artificial intelligence. I started projecting myself into the future by imagining the projects I could create and the problems I could solve thanks to coding.

steps.title: 2025 until today
steps.text: Since then, I have continued on this path and started developing several projects with my friend Romain (yes, the same one). I have developed several skills, in coding but also in design and project management. I have also started to be interested in entrepreneurship, by reading several books on the subject. On the other hand, I am in a period where I question myself a lot about my future, which is why I am constantly trying to learn and discover new things. Coding is probably not a finality for me.

engineeringAndSciences.title: Engineering and Sciences
engineeringAndSciences.text: Since I discovered coding, I have developed a fascination for everything that helps me understand how the world works and how to solve problems. Whether through computer science, mathematics, physics or other scientific fields, I like learning new concepts. I particularly appreciate the aspect of innovating and being useful.

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneurship.text: I think that entrepreneurship is the best way to innovate and create things when it is associated with engineering. We have a certain freedom, we can express ourselves. Moreover, realizing projects is rewarding and the competitive aspect is very interesting.

personalDevelopment.title: Personal Development
personalDevelopment.text: Since I stopped playing video games, I have wanted to change many aspects of myself. I have then developed a great interest in personal development: sports, learning, productivity, etc. Developing myself is now my main goal, and I take a lot of pleasure in it.

adventureAndTravel.title: Adventure and Travel
adventureAndTravel.text: I have always had an adventurous side: I love discovering and living experiences. Spending days in the mountains, going camping, traveling to foreign countries, etc. are things I like to do. Even if I haven't had the opportunity to travel much yet, I hope to be able to do so in the future.

It is edited by Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER, a physical person residing in France. In accordance with article 6-III-2 of the Law n°2004-575 (LCEN), the publisher has chosen to maintain the anonymity of his personal address. His complete contact information has been provided to the host Vercel Inc.

Data.title: 4. Personal Data
Data.text:
The data collected (name, email) via the site's contact methods is processed exclusively to respond to your collaboration or information requests. They are retained for a maximum duration of 3 years after the last contact.



In accordance with Law n°78-17 of January 6, 1978 relating to computer science, files and freedoms, users of the site {url} have the right of access, rectification and deletion of their personal data. To exercise this right, please contact Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER at the following email address : {email}.
